description: PROFINET DCP denial of service — unauthenticated remote crash via DCP flood
remediation: Update to latest firmware. Block DCP (ethertype 0x8892) from untrusted networks.

description: Code injection via web management interface
remediation: Update to V5.5.2 or later. Restrict web management access.
Update firmware. Disable SNMPv1/v2c. Use SNMPv3.
Update to ROS V5.6.0 or later.

description: Hardcoded credentials allowing remote admin access
remediation: Update firmware immediately. Change all default passwords.

description: Denial of service via crafted LLDP frames
remediation: Update to HiOS V09.1.01 or later.

description: Remote code execution via management interface
remediation: Update to latest firmware. Restrict management access to trusted networks.

description: Improper input validation in web interface
remediation: Update firmware. Restrict web management access.
